description_long: This is a large, vintage-style wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a distinctive pentagonal top. The upper section features two sliding doors with metallic handles, flanking a central open shelving area, ideal for displaying or storing items. Below the shelves are four small drawers on each side, also equipped with metallic handles, providing organized storage for smaller objects. The lower section consists of a wide drawer above three hinged doors, each with its own handle, offering ample enclosed storage space. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs and has a slightly protruding midsection, giving it a classic, robust appearance. The back and sides are solid wood, with no visible openings or glass panels.
description: A large, dark brown vintage wooden cabinet with sliding doors, multiple drawers, and lower storage compartments, featuring metallic handles and a classic, robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing sliding doors, open shelves, eight small drawers, a wide central drawer, and three lower doors with handles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabinet's depth, solid wood construction, and the protruding midsection.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, unadorned wooden back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cabinet's profile, solid wood surface, and the shape of the protruding midsection.
